title: taraxacum pastiniferum
intro: Taraxacum pastiniferum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain inulin and sesquiterpene lactones, compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pastiniferum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum pastiniferum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
